stem.description: The question text displayed to the learner

scenario.description: Shared scenario paragraph shown above the question stem (used in scenario-chain style)

scenarioId.description: Groups questions that share the same scenario

imageUrl.description: Optional URL to a diagram or image shown with the question

multiAnswer.description: If true, the learner must select all correct answers (checkboxes)

id.description: Choice identifier, e.g. A, B, C, D

correctAnswers.description: Array of choice IDs that are correct. Single-answer questions have exactly one entry.

explanation.description: Explanation of why the correct answer(s) are right, shown after submission

references.description: Authoritative reference links backing the explanation

domain.description: Exam domain this question belongs to
